Credit Only Granted for: EDCI783 or TLPL700.

Formerly: EDCI783.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 893

TLPL701 Computers in Science Education (3 Credits)

Current and projected methods by which computers can augment classroom and laboratory-based science instruction in school and non- school settings.

Prerequisite: Must have completed EDCI487; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI677 or TLPL701.
